description: Implement monitoring for payment failure rates to ensure that improvements to the checkout process do not negatively impact payment success.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the payment processing system WHEN payment failures are tracked THEN alerts must trigger if failure rate exceeds 3%.

description: Optimize the checkout API to ensure that the p95 latency is reduced to meet the 500ms SLO, which is critical for maintaining user trust and enabling new features.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the checkout API WHEN latency is measured THEN p95 latency must be <= 500ms.

description: Resolve issues with payment retries that are failing silently due to idempotency key collisions and race conditions, ensuring users are not double-charged.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a payment retry scenario WHEN a payment fails THEN the retry must succeed without silent failures.

story_title: Enhance Checkout Page Stability on Mobile
description: Fix issues causing the checkout page to crash on mobile devices, particularly iOS Safari and Android Chrome.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the checkout page on mobile WHEN they switch payment methods THEN the page must not crash.

description: Investigate and fix issues causing payment processing errors where users are charged but the transaction shows as failed.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a payment transaction WHEN a charge is confirmed THEN the transaction status must accurately reflect the payment outcome.

description: Develop a one-click purchase flow for returning customers that utilizes saved payment methods to streamline the checkout process.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a returning customer with saved payment methods WHEN they initiate checkout THEN they should see an option for one-click purchase that skips the review step.

description: Establish a mechanism to gather user experience feedback during the checkout process to identify pain points and areas for improvement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user completes a checkout WHEN they receive a feedback prompt THEN they should be able to provide feedback on their experience.
dependencies: story-monitor-payment-failure, story-checkout-api-latency, story-fix-payment-retry, story-fix-mobile-crash, story-fix-payment-processing-error, story-one-click-purchase

description: Automatically detect and apply the best available coupon at checkout to reduce friction and improve conversion rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user at checkout WHEN they have applicable coupons THEN the best coupon must be automatically applied.
dependencies: story-monitor-payment-failure, story-checkout-api-latency, story-fix-payment-retry, story-fix-mobile-crash, story-fix-payment-processing-error, story-one-click-purchase

story_title: Conduct A/B Testing for One-Click Purchase Flow
description: Run A/B tests to evaluate the impact of the one-click purchase flow on checkout conversion rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the one-click purchase flow is implemented WHEN A/B testing is conducted THEN conversion rates must be compared against a control group.

description: Display real-time purchase activity badges during checkout to enhance user confidence and potentially improve conversion rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user at checkout WHEN they view the checkout page THEN they should see social proof badges indicating recent purchases.
dependencies: story-monitor-payment-failure, story-checkout-api-latency, story-fix-payment-retry, story-fix-mobile-crash, story-fix-payment-processing-error, story-one-click-purchase

description: Current payment gateway contract expires Q3 2026. Migration to StripeConnect is planned to reduce transaction fees by 0.3% and improve international payment support. This is a 6-8 week effort that will freeze feature development on the checkout flow during migration.
dependencies: story-monitor-payment-failure, story-checkout-api-latency, story-fix-payment-retry, story-fix-mobile-crash, story-fix-payment-processing-error, story-one-click-purchase
